data.title: 国际服主线Vol.1 第三章 Part2更新

data.body:
[Main Story Announcement]

The Main Story Vol. 1 Foreclosure Task Force Chapter 3 Part 2 'Traces of a Dream' is coming soon, Sensei!

Please look forward to it!

#BlueArchive
